SLSQP (long-only)

200-point sweep

div.div:
🧠 risk_assessment.py
• QUESTIONS (10 items)
• score_to_A()
normalise → invert → A∈[1,8]
• describe_profile()
• calculate_utility()
U = r − (A·σ²)/2

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 195px; height: 1px; padding-top: 640px; margin-left: 1319px;

div.div:
⚙️ optimizer.py
• find_optimal_portfolio()
max U = w·μ − (A/2)·w·Σ·w
via SLSQP
• sensitivity_analysis()
sweeps A ∈ [1, 8]
